generated_oml:
instance GantryCraneSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on physical gantry crane providing real-time state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GantryCraneSensor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time state data from gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization dashboard tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating IoT communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module encapsulating C4 container components for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for system deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD and kinematic simulation tool for crane model creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation model of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic simulation model for motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for precise movement management"
    DTDFVocab:provides PreciseMovementAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for time-series operational data storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring crane state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation to ensure synchronization between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance PreciseMovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise movement management for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational data for analysis and research"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring insight for crane state"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for detecting faults in the crane system"
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for system evolution and adaptation"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and education using the gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, Controller, GantryCraneSensor, PhysicalCraneInterface, GantryLib, Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, EclipseMosquitto, Fusion360
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane structure in laboratory environment"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller unit managing physical crane operations"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane and transmitting via MQTT"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted via MQTT to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system uses the C4 Model for architectural visualization and adopts an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework, leveraging containerization for deployment to support logistics and cyber-physical systems applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system uses MQTT for inter-service communication signaling."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The entire system runs on a personal computer with all software components deployed locally. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services are containerized using Docker, ensuring consistent and isolated execution environments."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model [5] for architecture visualization, creating context and container diagrams to structure software components."
]
